data.title: KGL Resources Director Increases Shareholding
data.description:
An update from KGL Resources Limited ( (AU:KGL) ) is now available.

KGL Resources Limited has announced a change in the director’s interest, specifically involving Jeffrey Gerard, who has increased his indirect interest in the company through an entitlement offer. The transaction involved acquiring 211,191 ordinary shares at $0.095 per share, raising his total holdings to 1,900,716 shares. This change in shareholding could potentially impact the company’s operations and market perception, as it reflects confidence from the director in the company’s future prospects.

More about KGL Resources Limited

data.title: bettermoo(d) Announces $400,000 Private Placement to Boost Operations
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Happy Supplements Inc. ( (TSE:MOOO) ).

bettermoo(d) Food Corporation has announced a non-brokered private placement offering of up to 1,818,182 units at $0.22 per unit, aiming to raise up to $400,000. The proceeds will support existing operations and general working capital. The private placement is expected to close around April 16, 2025, subject to regulatory approvals, and includes a statutory hold period for issued securities. This move is part of bettermoo(d)’s strategy to strengthen its financial position and continue its growth in the plant-based dairy alternative market.

More about Happy Supplements Inc.

bettermoo(d) Food Corporation is an innovative plant-based dairy alternative food and beverage company based in Vancouver, British Columbia, Canada. The company is known for launching Moodrink™, a nutritious dairy alternative beverage that mimics the taste of traditional milk from the Alps regions of Switzerland, France, and Austria. bettermoo(d) aims to produce sustainable and nutritious dairy alternative products, including Moogurt and Buetter, that are good for both people and the planet.

YTD Price Performance: -40.0%

Average Trading Volume: 19,007

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: C$3.3M

data.title: Acrux Limited Announces Registry Office Relocation
data.description:
Acrux Limited ( (AU:ACR) ) has issued an announcement.

Acrux Limited announced a change in the address of its registry office in Sydney, effective from April 14, 2025. The registry, managed by MUFG Corporate Markets (AU) Limited, will relocate to Liberty Place, Level 41, 161 Castlereagh St, Sydney. This change is part of the company’s ongoing operational adjustments and does not affect contact details, ensuring continuity for stakeholders.

More about Acrux Limited

Acrux Limited is a specialty pharmaceutical company with a robust history in developing and commercializing topically applied pharmaceutical products. With 25 years of experience, the company has successfully marketed products globally, particularly in the United States. Acrux focuses on formulating and developing a range of topical generic products, leveraging its skilled workforce and facilities to deliver affordable solutions. The company is open to collaboration and commercial partnerships.

Average Trading Volume: 1,000

data.title: Panther Minerals Announces New Director Appointment
data.description:
An update from Lithium Lion Metals ( (TSE:PURR) ) is now available.

Panther Minerals Inc. has appointed Mr. Casey Forward as a new director, replacing Mr. Michael Leahy who has resigned. This leadership change is expected to bring Mr. Forward’s extensive experience in public and private companies to the board, potentially impacting the company’s strategic direction and stakeholder interests.

Panther Minerals Inc. is a mineral exploration company focused on exploring its North American project portfolio. The company is committed to acquiring advanced, high-quality uranium projects that can be efficiently explored.

data.title: Integral Diagnostics Announces Cessation of Securities
data.description:
Integral Diagnostics Ltd. ( (AU:IDX) ) has shared an update.

Integral Diagnostics Ltd. announced the cessation of certain securities, specifically 50,871 performance rights under LTI and 10,101 under STI, due to unmet conditions. This cessation may impact the company’s financial structuring and stakeholder interests, reflecting on the company’s operational strategies and market positioning.

Integral Diagnostics Ltd. operates in the healthcare industry, specializing in diagnostic imaging services. The company provides a range of medical imaging services including X-rays, MRIs, and CT scans, focusing on delivering high-quality patient care and advanced diagnostic solutions.

data.title: Sakai Moving Service Reports March 2025 Sales Growth
data.description:

Sakai Moving Service Co., Ltd. reported its monthly sales for March 2025, showing a year-over-year increase in sales across most regions, with a total annual sales growth of 2.6%. Sakai Moving Service Co., Ltd. operates in the logistics industry, specializing in moving services across various regions in Japan. The company focuses on providing efficient and reliable moving solutions, catering to both individual and corporate clients.

data.title: CDC Expands Data Center Operations in Melbourne
data.description:
An announcement from Infratil Limited ( (IFUUF) ) is now available.

CDC, a subsidiary of Infratil Limited, has expanded its operations with the opening of its first data center campus in Melbourne, known as the Brooklyn campus, which became operational in 2024. This state-of-the-art facility enhances CDC’s high-density capacity and interconnectivity in the region. Additionally, the construction of the Laverton campus, which began in February 2025, will further bolster CDC’s presence in Victoria, with plans to increase total capacity in the state to over 785MW.

More about Infratil Limited

Infratil Limited is a New Zealand-based infrastructure investment company with a focus on sectors such as renewable energy, data centers, and airports. The company invests in and manages a diverse portfolio of businesses, aiming to deliver sustainable returns to its stakeholders.
